message:
🐛 Persist tour dismissed state to settings.json (#904)

Tour completion/skip state was only stored in localStorage, so clearing
the browser cache would re-show the tour prompt. Now syncs the tour
state through the settings persistence system to ~/.kc/settings.json.

- Add tourCompleted to AllSettings type
- Add collect/restore for tour key in settingsSync
- Dispatch SETTINGS_CHANGED_EVENT on tour complete/skip/reset
- Listen for SETTINGS_RESTORED_EVENT to re-read state from file

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -68,6 +68,7 @@ export interface AllSettings {
   accessibility: AccessibilitySettingsData
   profile: ProfileSettingsData
   widget: WidgetSettingsData
+  tourCompleted: boolean
 
   // Sensitive (decrypted in transit over localhost)
   apiKeys: Record<string, APIKeyEntry>
